scripts.deploy: vp exec opennextjs-cloudflare build && vp run verify:worker-name && vp exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy:upload: vp exec opennextjs-cloudflare build && vp run verify:worker-name && vp exec opennextjs-cloudflare upload
scripts.deploy:promote: vp run verify:worker-name && vp exec wrangler versions deploy --yes
scripts.preview: vp exec opennextjs-cloudflare build && vp exec opennextjs-cloudflare preview
